title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior, through the National Commission to Prevent and Eradicate Violence against Women, the State of Mexico and the Municipal System for the Integral Development of the Familia de Tlalnepantla de Baz, which aims to grant a subsidy for the Project called R-2024-016, referring to the Support Program for Specialized Shelters for Women Victims of Gender Violence, their Daughters and Sons, for fiscal year 2024.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior, through the National Commission to Prevent and Eradicate Violence against Women, the State of Michoacán de Ocampo and the Ministry of Substantive Equality andWomen's Development, which aims to grant the Project called R-2024-011, referring to the Support Program for Specialized Shelters for Women Victims of Gender Violence, their Daughters and Sons, for fiscal year 2024.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior, through the National Commission to Prevent and Eradicate Violence against Women, the State of Morelos and the Refuge for Women Victims of Violence Agua Azul dthe Municipality of Jojutla, which aims to grant the Project called R-2024-023, referring to the Support Program for Specialized Shelters for Women Victims of Gender Violence, their Daughters and Sons, for fiscal year 2024.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior, through the General Directorate of the National Registry of Population and Identity, and the Institute for the Development and Attention to Youth of the State of Guanajuato, to promotethe adoption, use and certification of the Unique Population Registration Code (CURP), among the users of the JUVENTUDESGTO.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER MINISTRY OF FINANCE AND PUBLIC CREDIT
description: Notification by means of which the initiation of the administrative procedure to issue the Declaration of Subjection to the Public Domain Regime of the Federation is announced, with respect to the Federal Property that is indicated, as it is in the event ofestablished in article 29 section IV in relation to articles 6 section V and Transitory Fourth of the General Law of National Assets. (RFI 30-26713-7).

title: Secretariat of Environment and Natural Resources
description: Notice informing the general public that the study carried out by the Ministry of Environment and Natural Resources through the National Commission of Protected Natural Areas to justify the expedition is available to themof the Decree declaring the site known as El Chamizal an ecological restoration zone, with a total area of 327-72-81.95 hectares, located in the Municipality of Juárez, in the State of Chihuahua.

title: EXECUTIVE BRANCH MINISTRY OF HEALTH
description: Coordination Agreement for the transfer of federal resources as subsidies, for the strengthening of institutional actions in the field of migrant children, social assistance centers, welfare establishments and authorized places, which operate thestate and municipal DIF stems, in terms of the Social Assistance Law, the General Law on the Rights of Children and Adolescents, the Migration Law and the Law on Refugees, Complementary Protection and Political Asylum, which celebrate the Systema National for the Integral Development of the Family, the System for the Integral Development of the Family of the State of Chiapas and the Municipality of Frontera Hidalgo, together with the System for the Integral Development of the Family of that municipality.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER ENERGY REGULATORY COMMISSION
description: Agreement No. A/054/2024 of the Energy Regulatory Commission by which the General Administrative Provisions are issued that establish the regulatory bases to authorize requirements inspection units for load centers and the industryin the areas of generation, transmission and distribution of electrical energy, as well as the procedure applicable to inspections and the operating conditions of the inspection units.

title: AUTONOMOUS ORGANIZATIONS BANCO DE MEXICO
description: Exchange rate to settle obligations denominated in foreign currency payable in the Mexican Republic.

description: Interbank interest rate of equilibrium of funding to one banking business day.

title: AUTONOMOUS BODIES NATIONAL ELECTORAL INSTITUTE
description: Agreement of the General Council of the National Electoral Institute regarding the requests for replacements of candidates for senatorships and federal deputies for both principles presented by the national political parties and coalitions for the Federal Electoral Process 2023-2024, as well as in compliance with the order of the Xalapa Regional Chamber of the Electoral Tribunal of the Judicial Power of the Federation in file SX-RAP-86/2024.
